title: orchis × ligustica nothosubsp. reginae
intro: Orchis × ligustica nothosubsp. reginae is a hybrid orchid species derived from a cross between the Orchis italica and Orchis mascula plants. It is also known as the 'Queen's Orchid', and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce stress, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a potential treatment for various conditions such as hypertension and infections. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are believed to promote overall well-being and provide relief from certain health issues.
